episodes.title: Episode 1: The Beginning - Why Yakira Exists
episodes.description: Yvonne shares the divine calling that led to Yakira Kids Network and introduces the mission to support Africa's displaced children.

episodes.title: Episode 2: Meet Pastor Johnson - Spiritual Foundation
episodes.description: Pastor Johnson explains the spiritual pillar and how faith shapes everything we do at Yakira.

episodes.title: Episode 3: First Meal Program - Feeding Hope
episodes.description: Watch as we serve the first meals through the Monthly Sustenance Program in Rwanda.

episodes.title: Episode 4: Education for All - Scholarships in Kenya
episodes.description: Discover how your support is putting uniforms on children and pencils in their hands.

episodes.title: Episode 5: Creative Skills Hub - Launch Day
episodes.description: Watch the excitement as we open our first Creative Skill Hub for digital learning and arts.
